entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the crop studied for resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: Atherigona soccata, the insect pest attacking sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SHOOT FLY
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist attack by A. soccata

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS FOR OVIPOSITION
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where the insect is deterred from laying eggs

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance affecting the development or survival of the insect larvae and pupae

entities.name: RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to recover from the damage caused by the pest

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand the pest attack

entities.name: TILLER DEADHEARTS
entities.description: A symptom of shoot fly attack characterized by the death of the central leaf

entities.name: GREENHOUSE AND FIELD EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of testing sorghum genotypes under controlled and natural environments

entities.name: MULTI- AND DUAL-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental setups used to observe antixenosis for oviposition

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental setups used to observe antixenosis for oviposition

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Efforts to develop sorghum cultivars with improved resistance

entities.name: PATANCHERU, ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The site where the evaluations were conducted

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The diversity of genes contributing to resistance in the population
